title: nyquist~

methods.description: set and get the Nyquist frequency in Hz
set and get the Nyquist frequency in kHz
set and get the Nyquist period in ms
set and get the Nyquist period in seconds

body: [nyquist~] reports the Nyquist (which is half the sample rate) as a frequency or period. It sends it when loading the patch, when receiving a bang or when the sample rate changes. It reports it either in Hz or kHz and the period either in seconds or milliseconds. like [sr~], it doesn't report up/down sampling rates.
